hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
def _fix_dev(a): return re.sub(r'(?:^|\\s)(--save-dev|-D)(?=\\s|$)', ' -d', a).strip()
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
n = cmd
if cmd and not (cmd.startswith('bun ') or cmd == 'bun'):
    if m := re.match(r'^(?:npx|pnpx)([\\s].+)?$', cmd): n = 'bunx' + (m[1] or '')
    elif m := re.match(r'^npm\\s+(.*)?$', cmd):
        r = (m[1] or '').strip()
        if re.match(r'^(?:install|i)$', r): n = 'bun install'
        elif m2 := re.match(r'^(?:install|i)\\s+(.+)$', r): n = 'bun add ' + _fix_dev(m2[1])
        elif m2 := re.match(r'^(?:uninstall|un|remove|rm|r)\\s+(.+)$', r): n = 'bun remove ' + m2[1]
        elif m2 := re.match(r'^run\\s+(.+)$', r): n = 'bun run ' + m2[1]
        elif re.match(r'^(?:test|t)$', r): n = 'bun test'
        elif m2 := re.match(r'^exec\\s+(.+)$', r): n = 'bunx ' + m2[1]
        else: n = ('bun ' + r) if r else 'bun'
    elif m := re.match(r'^pnpm\\s+(.*)?$', cmd):
        r = (m[1] or '').strip()
        if re.match(r'^install$', r): n = 'bun install'
        elif m2 := re.match(r'^add\\s+(.+)$', r): n = 'bun add ' + _fix_dev(m2[1])
        elif m2 := re.match(r'^(?:remove|rm|uninstall|un)\\s+(.+)$', r): n = 'bun remove ' + m2[1]
        elif m2 := re.match(r'^run\\s+(.+)$', r): n = 'bun run ' + m2[1]
        elif re.match(r'^test$', r): n = 'bun test'
        elif m2 := re.match(r'^exec\\s+(.+)$', r): n = 'bunx ' + m2[1]
        else: n = ('bun ' + r) if r else 'bun'
    elif m := re.match(r'^yarn(?:\\s+(.*)?)?$', cmd):
        r = (m[1] or '').strip()
        if not r or re.match(r'^install$', r): n = 'bun install'
        elif m2 := re.match(r'^add\\s+(.+)$', r): n = 'bun add ' + _fix_dev(m2[1])
        elif m2 := re.match(r'^(?:remove|uninstall)\\s+(.+)$', r): n = 'bun remove ' + m2[1]
        elif m2 := re.match(r'^run\\s+(.+)$', r): n = 'bun run ' + m2[1]
        elif re.match(r'^test$', r): n = 'bun test'
        else: n = 'bun ' + r
if n != cmd:
    d['tool_input']['command'] = n
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'updatedInput': d['tool_input']}}))
"

plugins.name: coding
plugins.description: Programming skills: Python, TypeScript, FastAPI, Postgres, coding guidelines, and more

plugins.name: ui
plugins.description: UI framework skills: KendoReact component patterns, theming, and best practices

plugins.name: databricks
plugins.description: Databricks skills: CLI operations, Spark Connect local execution, and cluster management

plugins.name: fabricks-data
plugins.description: Fabricks data skills: SQL analysis and domain glossary

plugins.name: azure-diagnostics
plugins.description: Systematic diagnosis and remediation for Azure production issues using AppLens, Monitor, and resource health. Covers Container Apps, Function Apps, and AKS clusters.

plugins.name: azure-deploy
plugins.description: Execute Azure deployments (azd up, azd deploy, terraform apply, az deployment) with pre-deploy validation, RBAC health checks, EF migrations, and post-deployment verification.

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Ultra-compressed caveman communication mode — cuts token usage ~75% while keeping full technical accuracy. Supports intensity levels: lite, full, ultra.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Writing skills: Documentation, technical writing, and content creation

plugins.name: bms
plugins.description: BMsuisse master skill — /bms activates all core coding guidelines at once. Sub-commands: /bms sql, /bms python, /bms data. Always enables caveman communication style.
